hooks.command: last_handoff=$(git -C "$PWD" log --follow -- HANDOFF.md -1 --format='%H' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); latest=$(git -C "$PWD" log -1 --format='%H' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); [ -n "$latest" ] && [ "$last_handoff" != "$latest" ] && echo 'HANDOFF.md is behind HEAD. Update it with this session changes (new session block + any stale sections), then commit and push.' || true
